alert_rules.name: alert-transfer-failures
alert_rules.description: More than 3 call transfer failures detected in a 5 minute window
alert_rules.query: traces | where timestamp > ago(5m) | where message contains 'Transfer FAILED' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-speech-recognition-errors
alert_rules.description: Speech recognition failure rate exceeds 20% over 15 minutes
alert_rules.query: let total = traces | where timestamp > ago(15m) | where message contains 'Speech recognised' or message contains 'RecognizeFailed' | count; let failed = traces | where timestamp > ago(15m) | where message contains 'RecognizeFailed' | count; print rate = todouble(failed) / todouble(total) * 100

alert_rules.name: alert-function-exceptions
alert_rules.description: Any unhandled exception in the Function App
alert_rules.query: exceptions | where timestamp > ago(5m) | where cloud_RoleName contains 'receptionist' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-keyvault-access-failures
alert_rules.description: Key Vault returning errors — secrets may be inaccessible
alert_rules.query: traces | where timestamp > ago(5m) | where message contains 'Key Vault' and (message contains '403' or message contains 'Forbidden' or message contains 'Unauthorized') | count

alert_rules.name: alert-function-unavailable
alert_rules.description: No incoming calls processed in 1 hour during expected business hours — Function App may be down
alert_rules.note: Only meaningful during business hours — consider disabling on weekends

alert_rules.name: alert-graph-api-failures
alert_rules.description: Graph API returning errors — staff directory lookup failing
alert_rules.query: traces | where timestamp > ago(10m) | where message contains 'Graph API error' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-high-fallback-rate
alert_rules.description: More than 10 calls routed to default reception in 30 minutes — possible speech recognition or matching issue
alert_rules.query: traces | where timestamp > ago(30m) | where message contains 'routing to reception' | count

alert_rules.name: alert-client-secret-expiry
alert_rules.description: App Registration client secret expires within 30 days
alert_rules.note: Checked by Rotate-ClientSecret.ps1 and Set-AlertRules.ps1. Run monthly as part of lifecycle review.

severity_reference.0: Critical — immediate action required (Azure Monitor Sev 0)

notes: This file is read by Set-AlertRules.ps1 to create Azure Monitor alert rules.
The teams webhook URL must be a Power Automate workflow URL — Office 365 Connector URLs (*.webhook.office.com) are deprecated.
scheduled_query alerts require App Insights to be linked to the Function App.
The client_secret_expiry alert is handled via PowerShell — not a native Azure Monitor rule.
Adjust threshold values to suit your call volume after the first 2 weeks of operation.
